biomedica-storefront-tests

Biomedica QA dashboard

Hub for Allure HTML reports published from GitHub Actions after each CI run.

  • Smoke FR — every push / PR gate
  • Smoke EN — nightly parity (04:00 UTC)
  • E2E FR — nightly checkout flows (03:00 UTC)
  • E2E EN — weekly parity (Monday 05:00 UTC)

Inside each suite, open the Graphs and Timeline tabs for run history (builds after ~5 runs).

Powered by Allure Report
